UserProfile.title: User Profile
UserProfile.description: User specific goals and settings for customized meal planning.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the user.

preferences.description: Meal and diet preferences (e.g., vegetarian, gluten-free, none).

healthGoals.description: Nutritional goals (e.g. high protein, low carb, calories).

budgetLimit.description: Monthly or weekly budget limit for groceries.

MealPlan.title: Meal Plan
MealPlan.description: Generated breakfast, lunch, and dinner plans with context matching.

userId.description: The unique Firebase Auth identifier of the owner.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this meal plan was auto-generated.

date.description: The day of the meal plan (e.g., May 20, Tue).

breakfast.description: The generated breakfast item with title, calories, prepTime, ingredients, and steps.

lunch.description: The generated lunch item with title, calories, prepTime, ingredients, and steps.

dinner.description: The generated dinner item with title, calories, prepTime, ingredients, and steps.

groceryList.description: Array of grocery items with estimated costs.

substitutions.description: Smart swaps based on budget or availability.

budgetFeasibility.description: Breakdown of the meal plan's budget suitability.

/users/{userId}/meal_plans/{planId}.description: Sub-collection of customized day-by-day meal plans.
